TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tjuvecekadan Itiniay i Chunri Cen no Pingtung ko Tjuvecekadan a niyaro', 304 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,097 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,051 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 46 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan94%, Bunun1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjo~u~ub~vəʦəkaɬ~ɮan itiniaj i ʦħo~u~unri ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~ub~vəʦəkaɬ~ɮan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tjuvecekadan Itiniay i Chunri Cen no Pingtung ko Tjuvecekadan a niyaro', 304 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,097 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,051 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 46 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan94%, Bunun1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjo~u~ub~vəʦəkaɬ~ɮan itiniaj i ʦħo~u~unri ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~ub~vəʦəkaɬ~ɮan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
